title: Site Inspection
description: We visit the site, assess the structure condition, identify corrosion levels, and recommend the optimal coating system.

title: Surface Preparation
description: All surfaces are cleaned, degreased, mechanically ground, and sand blasted to the required surface profile before any coating is applied.

title: Coating Application
description: The approved coating system is applied in the correct sequence — primer, mid-coat, and topcoat — with DFT checks at every stage.

title: Quality Check & Handover
description: Final inspection of film thickness, coverage, and finish quality. We only hand over when every square meter meets our quality standard.
